storyHook: 找网络、输密码、连上上网
storyBlurb: 比赛直播在即，甲的网络却突然中断。在室友乙的帮助下，他靠近路由器重输密码，终于连上网络。
storyScript:
【开场·发现连不上】晚上九点，客厅的灯光昏黄。甲瘫在沙发上，手机屏幕上是即将开始的比赛直播倒计时。他兴奋地调整坐姿，却发现画面卡在缓冲界面。刷新几次，依然无响应。甲心头一紧，退出重进，网络图标显示已断开。他起身走到路由器旁，信号满格，但手机就是连不上网。焦急中，他喊来室友乙。

【进行·找名字重试】乙接过手机，看了一眼列表，发现甲连错了隔壁的网络。他指着屏幕上的名字说，这个才是我们的。甲恍然大悟，连忙选中正确的网络。乙提醒他，密码可能记错了，建议重新输入。甲翻出手机备忘录里的密码，一个字母一个字母地敲，手指因紧张而微微颤抖。点击连接，等待，却弹出密码错误的提示。

【进行·输入密码】乙让甲冷静，自己拿过手机仔细输入。他一边输入一边念出每个字符，确保大小写无误。甲在一旁盯着屏幕，手心冒汗。按下连接键，转圈，几秒后，网络图标亮起。乙把手机还给甲，说试试看。甲打开直播软件，画面流畅加载，比赛刚好开始。

【收束·连接成功】甲长舒一口气，瘫回沙发，嘴角上扬。乙笑着拍拍他的肩，转身回房。客厅里只剩下直播的解说声和甲的欢呼。网络稳定，画面清晰，甲沉浸在比赛中，刚才的慌乱已烟消云散。

narrative.when: 晚上九点，正要看一场重要的比赛直播
narrative.where: 甲的客厅，路由器在角落
narrative.who: 甲（住户）· 乙（懂技术的室友）
narrative.how: 拿着手机走到路由器附近找信号
narrative.method: 发现连不上、检查名字、重新输入密码、连接成功
narrative.event: 甲的网突然断了，直播马上要开始

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Hey — is the net down?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not on my side. Works fine here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Mine just stopped. The play starts in two minutes.
turns.zh: 我的刚断，比赛还有两分钟开始。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Hold on. I am coming.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do not take too long. I can not miss the start.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me see your screen.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says no net. But I am standing right next to the box.
turns.zh: 显示无连接，但我就站在路由器旁边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are on the wrong net.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What? They all look the same.
turns.zh: 什么？这几个看起来都一样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Look at the name. You are on the next house.
turns.zh: 看名字，你连的是隔壁家的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Their secret word used to work.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They must have changed it. Take off this one and pick ours.
turns.zh: 他们一定换了密码，断开这个，选我们的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Which one is ours?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The one in the middle. You see the numbers at the end?
turns.zh: 中间那个，看到最后面那些数字了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Five two four... yes. Got it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now put in the secret word.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it still the same as when we set it up?
turns.zh: 还是我们设置时的那个密码吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Same as before.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Going in now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The secret word starts with a big letter.
turns.zh: 密码开头有一个大写字母。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh. Let me do it again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The play starts in one minute.
turns.zh: 比赛还有一分钟开始了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then type faster.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. Come on...

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it going through?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The circle is going round.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good sign.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says wrong secret word.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Did you use the big letter?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought I did.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me type it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Big letter first, then the numbers. Going slowly.
turns.zh: 先大写字母，然后数字，慢慢来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What is taking so long?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am being careful. Three wrong tries and it blocks us for five minutes.
turns.zh: 我在谨慎，错三次要被锁五分钟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What? We already tried twice.
turns.zh: 什么？我们已经试了两次了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I know. That is why I am going slowly.
turns.zh: 我知道，所以我在慢慢来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The play has started.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I know. Two seconds.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it...

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Wait for it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Come on, come on...

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There. It is through.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: YES.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Open the play thing.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is going. I can see the numbers!
turns.zh: 在加载！我能看到比分了！

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You missed the first two minutes.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What happened?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Nothing. Still no score.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, thank goodness.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You owe me a cold drink.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. I will get it now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quick. I want to watch too.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Cold water or the sweet kind?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sweet.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here. And thank you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not join strange nets in the future. That is how this happened.
turns.zh: 以后别随便连陌生网络，就是这样断掉的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought it was ours.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Always check the name.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will from now on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is the picture clear?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Very clear. No waiting at all.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Move your seat a bit to the right.
turns.zh: 好，你的椅子往右移一点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Does that make a difference?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: If the sign is low, yes. But yours is full, so not really.
turns.zh: 信号弱的时候有区别，但你已经满格了，所以没差。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then why did you tell me to move?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Old way of doing things.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your old way almost made me miss the ball.
turns.zh: 你的老习惯差点让我错过进球。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It has not gone in yet. Watch.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Does this happen a lot? Net going off?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not often. Last time was on a rainy night.
turns.zh: 不常有，上次是在下雨天晚上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Rain can do that?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Heavy rain can. The sign comes from outside.
turns.zh: 大雨会，信号是从外面来的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I never thought about where the sign comes from.
turns.zh: 我从来没想过信号从哪里来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Most people do not.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Should I keep the secret word written somewhere?
turns.zh: 我应该把密码写在某个地方吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Your phone should have it now after going through.
turns.zh: 连上之后你的手机应该自动保存了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So I just pick the name next time?
turns.zh: 以后我只要选名字就能连上了？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Unless someone changes the secret word.
turns.zh: 是的，除非有人改了密码。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Who would change it?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What? Why?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Every few months. For safety.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Tell me before you change it next time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I left a note on the table last time.
turns.zh: 上次我在桌子上留了一张纸条的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought that was a shopping list.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It said new secret word at the top.
turns.zh: 纸条最上面写着「新密码」。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I only read the numbers.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Those numbers were the price of eggs.
turns.zh: 那些数字是鸡蛋的价格。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No wonder it did not work.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Next time I will call you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Please. No more notes.
turns.zh: 好，请这样做，别留纸条了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The net is very good now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It always is once you are on the right one.
turns.zh: 一旦连上正确网络就一直很稳定。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Half time soon.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get some small food.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There are small round things in the cook place.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: From that place near the bus stop?
turns.zh: 是公交站旁边那家店买的？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I went this morning.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: These are good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I know. I had three on the way home.
turns.zh: 我知道，回家的路上我已经吃了三个了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Three.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do not judge me. The play is on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will stay for the second part.
turns.zh: 好吧，我留下来看下半场。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought you would.
turns.zh: 我就知道你会留下来的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You said I owe you a cold drink once.
turns.zh: 你说过你欠我一杯冷饮来着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was the other way round.
